eas_text: A civil authority has issued A PRACTICE/DEMO WARNING for the following counties or areas: San Jacinto, TX; at 08:14 AM ON APR 2, 2026 Effective until 08:14 AM APR 3, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a TEST of the Genasys Mass Notification System for San Jacinto Cnty. This test is being required by Texas Division of Emergency Management as part of a coordinated statewide drill of all local alerting systems in Texas. This is only a Test and there is no action required by anyone. This TEST has concluded. San Jacinto Cnty Office of Emergency Mngt
